plugin_desc: Asentria SiteBoss remote-site monitoring SNMP collection for devices under Asentria PEN 3052. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. SiteBoss EventSensor points are configurable per installation and need row-level interpretation before temperature, humidity, contact, relay or power-output points can be normalized, so they are not promoted into shared device-health metrics in this pass.
name: NetworkService
